markdown_formatted:
## Meeting Purpose

[Review Read.ai features against growthx.ai's requirements.](https://fathom.video/share/JyNy5-U8qSyikq5fxajpmuYLQ222Jvtc?tab=summary&timestamp=22.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [**Beta Access Available:** growthx.ai can get immediate beta access to the API and "intelligent sharing" (folders), which are key requirements.](https://fathom.video/share/JyNy5-U8qSyikq5fxajpmuYLQ222Jvtc?tab=summary&timestamp=112.0)
  - [**Critical Gaps Identified:** The "Global Access" feature lacks editor permissions, blocking urgent sharing changes. The "Loom-like" clipping/trimming feature is also missing.](https://fathom.video/share/JyNy5-U8qSyikq5fxajpmuYLQ222Jvtc?tab=summary&timestamp=232.0)
  - [**Pricing & Dates Required:** growthx.ai needs a formal proposal with pricing and firm delivery dates for all features before committing to testing.](https://fathom.video/share/JyNy5-U8qSyikq5fxajpmuYLQ222Jvtc?tab=summary&timestamp=981.0)
  - [**Data Migration Path:** Read.ai will provide a script for self-service Fathom data migration, with bulk upload services available for larger archives.](https://fathom.video/share/JyNy5-U8qSyikq5fxajpmuYLQ222Jvtc?tab=summary&timestamp=152.0)

## Topics

### Feature Gaps & Status

  - [**API MCP Support:** In beta; growthx.ai can get access and documentation.](https://fathom.video/share/JyNy5-U8qSyikq5fxajpmuYLQ222Jvtc?tab=summary&timestamp=112.0)
  - [**Global Access (Super User):**](https://fathom.video/share/JyNy5-U8qSyikq5fxajpmuYLQ222Jvtc?tab=summary&timestamp=232.0)
      - [**Current:** Viewer-only access to all workspace reports (recordings).](https://fathom.video/share/JyNy5-U8qSyikq5fxajpmuYLQ222Jvtc?tab=summary&timestamp=232.0)
      - [**Gap:** Lacks editor permissions to change sharing settings.](https://fathom.video/share/JyNy5-U8qSyikq5fxajpmuYLQ222Jvtc?tab=summary&timestamp=293.0)
      - [**Rationale:** Critical for urgent sharing changes (e.g., sharing an interview while a colleague is on PTO, unsharing sensitive data).](https://fathom.video/share/JyNy5-U8qSyikq5fxajpmuYLQ222Jvtc?tab=summary&timestamp=293.0)
      - [**Status:** Requires a quick fix to add editor permissions.](https://fathom.video/share/JyNy5-U8qSyikq5fxajpmuYLQ222Jvtc?tab=summary&timestamp=281.0)
  - [**Intelligent Sharing (Folders):**](https://fathom.video/share/JyNy5-U8qSyikq5fxajpmuYLQ222Jvtc?tab=summary&timestamp=407.0)
      - [**Requirement:** Auto-share calls based on rules (e.g., title, participants).](https://fathom.video/share/JyNy5-U8qSyikq5fxajpmuYLQ222Jvtc?tab=summary&timestamp=420.0)
      - [**Status:** "Shared Folders" feature enables this; growthx.ai can get access next week.](https://fathom.video/share/JyNy5-U8qSyikq5fxajpmuYLQ222Jvtc?tab=summary&timestamp=468.0)
      - [**Clarification:** Need to confirm if "Smart Folders" (auto-categorization) work with shared folders.](https://fathom.video/share/JyNy5-U8qSyikq5fxajpmuYLQ222Jvtc?tab=summary&timestamp=493.0)
  - [**Call Groupings & Search:**](https://fathom.video/share/JyNy5-U8qSyikq5fxajpmuYLQ222Jvtc?tab=summary&timestamp=541.0)
      - [**Requirement:** Search/chat across specific call groups (e.g., all calls with growthx.ai).](https://fathom.video/share/JyNy5-U8qSyikq5fxajpmuYLQ222Jvtc?tab=summary&timestamp=541.0)
      - [**Status:** Supported via "Search Copilot" and folders.](https://fathom.video/share/JyNy5-U8qSyikq5fxajpmuYLQ222Jvtc?tab=summary&timestamp=541.0)
  - [**Bi-directional Integrations:**](https://fathom.video/share/JyNy5-U8qSyikq5fxajpmuYLQ222Jvtc?tab=summary&timestamp=622.0)
      - [**Linear:** On roadmap; team is actively working on it.](https://fathom.video/share/JyNy5-U8qSyikq5fxajpmuYLQ222Jvtc?tab=summary&timestamp=622.0)
      - [**Vitality:** growthx.ai's future CS tool; Read.ai is open to exploring an integration.](https://fathom.video/share/JyNy5-U8qSyikq5fxajpmuYLQ222Jvtc?tab=summary&timestamp=646.0)
  - [**Call Snipping & Trimming:**](https://fathom.video/share/JyNy5-U8qSyikq5fxajpmuYLQ222Jvtc?tab=summary&timestamp=730.0)
      - [**Requirement:** Extract and share short clips; trim call start/end.](https://fathom.video/share/JyNy5-U8qSyikq5fxajpmuYLQ222Jvtc?tab=summary&timestamp=730.0)
      - [**Status:** Not currently available. A top-requested feature on the product roadmap.](https://fathom.video/share/JyNy5-U8qSyikq5fxajpmuYLQ222Jvtc?tab=summary&timestamp=730.0)
  - [**Table Stakes Features:**](https://fathom.video/share/JyNy5-U8qSyikq5fxajpmuYLQ222Jvtc?tab=summary&timestamp=800.0)
      - [**Private Notes:** Available in the desktop app and browser extension.](https://fathom.video/share/JyNy5-U8qSyikq5fxajpmuYLQ222Jvtc?tab=summary&timestamp=847.0)
      - [**Shareable Private Notes:** Status unknown; Alison to confirm.](https://fathom.video/share/JyNy5-U8qSyikq5fxajpmuYLQ222Jvtc?tab=summary&timestamp=847.0)
      - [**Summary/Action Item Editing:** Supported via manual edits and "Custom Vocabulary" (for auto-correction).](https://fathom.video/share/JyNy5-U8qSyikq5fxajpmuYLQ222Jvtc?tab=summary&timestamp=847.0)
      - [**Agentic Editing:** Not yet available. The product team is building "taking action" capabilities (e.g., "update summary with X").](https://fathom.video/share/JyNy5-U8qSyikq5fxajpmuYLQ222Jvtc?tab=summary&timestamp=932.0)

### Data Migration

  - [**Requirement:** Migrate \~1 year of recordings from Fathom.](https://fathom.video/share/JyNy5-U8qSyikq5fxajpmuYLQ222Jvtc?tab=summary&timestamp=152.0)
  - [**Options:**](https://fathom.video/share/JyNy5-U8qSyikq5fxajpmuYLQ222Jvtc?tab=summary&timestamp=171.0)
      - [**Self-Service:** Manual upload via credits (impractical for a full archive).](https://fathom.video/share/JyNy5-U8qSyikq5fxajpmuYLQ222Jvtc?tab=summary&timestamp=171.0)
      - [**Bulk Upload:** Read.ai engineering can perform a bulk upload from a shared drive (e.g., Dropbox, Drive).](https://fathom.video/share/JyNy5-U8qSyikq5fxajpmuYLQ222Jvtc?tab=summary&timestamp=171.0)
  - [**Test Plan:** growthx.ai needs a script to export a single meeting from Fathom and upload it to Read.ai to validate the process.](https://fathom.video/share/JyNy5-U8qSyikq5fxajpmuYLQ222Jvtc?tab=summary&timestamp=198.0)

### Pricing & Evaluation

  - [**growthx.ai's Position:** Requires a formal proposal with pricing and firm delivery dates for all features before committing to testing.](https://fathom.video/share/JyNy5-U8qSyikq5fxajpmuYLQ222Jvtc?tab=summary&timestamp=981.0)
  - [**Rationale:** Avoids "vaporware" and ensures a clear understanding of the product's current state and future roadmap.](https://fathom.video/share/JyNy5-U8qSyikq5fxajpmuYLQ222Jvtc?tab=summary&timestamp=981.0)

## Next Steps

  - [**Alison Barker (Read.ai):**](https://fathom.video/share/JyNy5-U8qSyikq5fxajpmuYLQ222Jvtc?tab=summary&timestamp=1124.0)
      - [Send growthx.ai the API beta documentation.](https://fathom.video/share/JyNy5-U8qSyikq5fxajpmuYLQ222Jvtc?tab=summary&timestamp=112.0)
      - [Provide a script for a single Fathom meeting export/upload test.](https://fathom.video/share/JyNy5-U8qSyikq5fxajpmuYLQ222Jvtc?tab=summary&timestamp=198.0)
      - [Confirm if "Smart Folders" work with shared folders.](https://fathom.video/share/JyNy5-U8qSyikq5fxajpmuYLQ222Jvtc?tab=summary&timestamp=493.0)
      - [Confirm if private notes can be shared.](https://fathom.video/share/JyNy5-U8qSyikq5fxajpmuYLQ222Jvtc?tab=summary&timestamp=847.0)
      - [Deliver a formal proposal by EOW with:](https://fathom.video/share/JyNy5-U8qSyikq5fxajpmuYLQ222Jvtc?tab=summary&timestamp=1124.0)
          - [Pricing details.](https://fathom.video/share/JyNy5-U8qSyikq5fxajpmuYLQ222Jvtc?tab=summary&timestamp=1124.0)
          - [Firm delivery dates for all discussed features.](https://fathom.video/share/JyNy5-U8qSyikq5fxajpmuYLQ222Jvtc?tab=summary&timestamp=1124.0)
